winner: I tried to measure the contents of my fridge to see if I'd lost weight, but it turns out I just gained a whole lot more refrigerator.

candidates.text: I tried measuring my fridge for a new door, but it turned out I was just *chill*ing out with my old one!
I measured my fridge to see if it could fit my ego—it turned out it was already calibrated for it, but I still couldn’t close the door when I tried to step inside.
I measured the fridge for a new shelf, but it was such a tight fit I had to use duct tape just to open the door.
